title: lobelia polyphylla f. hyssopifolia
intro: Lobelia polyphylla f. hyssopifolia, also known as Lobelia hyssopifolia, is a subspecies of the Lobelia polyphylla plant, which is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. This plant is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Lobelia polyphylla f. hyssopifolia include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing muscle spasms and inflammation. Lobelia polyphylla f. hyssopifolia can be prepared into various herbal products, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are often used to treat respiratory and musculoskeletal conditions.
